_comment: Hand-maintained permanent stop-loss ledger for the scorecard. Keyed by ticker. Once a pick's trailing stop fires, its stopDate/stopLevel/lockedPct are recorded here from the FULL (from-inception) price history, computed once and frozen. Read by build.js -> attached as `forcedStop` -> scorecard.js skips its own live stop-scan for these tickers and uses these fixed values instead. This exists because scorecard.js's live fetch is a rolling 3-month window: once a pick's entry date rolls outside that window, the live scan silently re-anchors 'entry' to a later bar, which can erase or corrupt a real historical stop event. See wiki/scorecard.md 'Permanent stop ledger' and wiki/log.md 2026-07-23 entry (1913.HK Prada incident).
